name: GS-IRF
scope: Intermediate stage in transformations - not used otherwise.
area: Denmark - onshore Jutland, Funen, Zealand and Lolland.
remarks: Artificial CRS created in 2022 to assist the transformation of coordinates between the historic Generalstabens System and ETRS89 through CT ETRS89 to GS-IRF (1) (code 10259) used in conjunction with the GS LCC map projection (code 10257).
